ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Duke of Santa Lucia|Knight of San Giacomo|Prefect of the Senate of Palermo
ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 209 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
